text: Reminder: Gatsby essays due next Monday at midnight. Upload to Classroom — no email submissions accepted. See me during tutorial if you need feedback on your thesis.
Budget presentations begin Monday. Come prepared — your slides must be submitted by Friday evening. I will project from your shared Google Slides link.
AP Government exam is May 6. Office hours added Tuesday and Thursday 7-8am through May 5. Review packet posted in Materials.
Personal Narratives have been returned with comments. Please review feedback and come ready to discuss revisions on Thursday.
Lab reports graded — averages were strong. Genetics unit starts Monday. Pre-reading (Chapter 9, sections 9.1 and 9.2) is expected before class.
Systems of Equations quiz is Friday. Study guide is posted — it covers everything on the quiz. Practice problems are optional but recommended.
Winter recital is December 11 here at Crestview. Costume confirmations are due June 30. Rehearsal schedule for fall will be posted in August. Have a wonderful summer!
